title: Great app to personalize your migraine journey
text: I've tested multiple apps trying to find the right one to help me monitor, track, predict, prevent and treat my migraines. If you're reading this, you can relate. This is the one.

title: Tested and trusted
text: All of my migraines were in line with high or medium risk days on the app. After seeing High risk with my severe migraine today, here I am writing this review.

title: Helpful app
text: I was sceptical at first, but the weather does have impact on my migraine, a lot more than I ever thought possible. This app has become my daily go-to.
